message:
perf(hostcall-queue): add BTreeSet index for S3-FIFO ghost queue O(log n) lookups

S3FifoState.ghost was using linear VecDeque scans for both consume_ghost_hit()
and record_ghost_entry() duplicate detection. Add a parallel ghost_set (BTreeSet)
that mirrors the deque contents — consume_ghost_hit checks the set first (O(log n)
vs O(n)), record_ghost_entry uses set.contains() to skip the linear position scan
when the entry is new. Both structures are kept in sync on insert, remove, clear,
and capacity eviction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
